items.title: Towards Generalizable and Efficient Large-Scale Generative Recommenders

items.title: Optimizing Recommendation Systems with JDK's Vector API
items.summary: 使用JDK Vector API优化Netflix Ranker服务性能，利用SIMD指令加速向量运算

items.title: Democratizing Machine Learning at Netflix: Building the Model Lifecycle Graph
items.summary: 构建模型生命周期图谱，将MDS从被动目录转变为主动的ML资产推荐引擎

items.title: Foundation Model for Personalized Recommendation
items.summary: Netflix探索将Foundation Model应用于个性化推荐，整合大规模交互历史和内容信息
